attacking_style: Shows willingness for long-range solo moves (20km out) but lacks sustained power to finish; more effective as a high-tempo pacemaker on extended climbs than explosive finisher.
team_tactics: Deployed as elite threshold domestique in final climb scenarios; team leverages his diesel engine capacity to control pace and protect GC leaders rather than hunt personal results.
terrain_preference: Extended steady-gradient climbs where threshold power dominates; struggles on punchy, variable-gradient finishes requiring repeated accelerations or explosive changes of pace.
vulnerability: Insufficient form and punch for hillier, technical finishes where specialists thrive; solo attacks fade quickly (1km duration) when not at peak condition.
key_patterns: Elite pacemaking capacity: solo tempo efforts spanning 9km+ on final climbs (2 observations).
Long-range attacks show ambition but lack finishing power; moves neutralized within 1-2km (2 observations).
Strong domestique rather than finisher: hot seat performances and tempo work outweigh breakthrough wins (3 observations).
Team depth allows tactical flexibility: used opportunistically in GC support or breakaway roles (2 observations).
form_trajectory: positive: Latest 2023 observation shows elite threshold capacity returning; capable of sustained high-power pacing on key climbs for GC support.
